metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.created_total
metrics.description: delegation_type: oof / handover / emergency. Fires on DelegationCreated.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.activated_total
metrics.description: Fires on DelegationActivated. Same-hour create+activate emits both created + activated.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.duration_hours
metrics.description: Distribution of the actual duration a delegation was in effect (from activation to expiration or revocation). Feeds product-team analysis of OOF adoption patterns.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.self_overlap_detected_total
metrics.description: Fires on DelegationSelfOverlapDetected. > 0 usually indicates a UX bug in the tenant admin surface OR an abuse attempt.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.resolver.lookup_total
metrics.description: outcome: hit / miss / cache_hit. DelegationResolver's read counter — hit-rate feeds cache tuning.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.resolver.duration_ms
metrics.description: DelegationResolver::activeAsDelegate() latency. P99 target < 10ms — the resolver is on the RBAC PermissionResolver hot-path.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.started_total
metrics.description: Fires on ImpersonationSessionStarted. department is the impersonator's department (support is expected to dominate).

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.duration_seconds
metrics.description: Session duration. Most support sessions expected in the 5-30 minute band.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.extended_total
metrics.description: Extensions granted by super_admin. Rare — a step-up in this counter draws review.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.attempt_refused_total
metrics.description: refusal_reason: missing_entitlement / operator_not_active / target_not_found / cross_tenant_target / target_tenant_disabled / target_application_disabled / ttl_out_of_bounds / reason_too_short / target_tenant_locked_down.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.concurrent_active
metrics.description: Current count of active impersonation sessions across the platform. Feeds the active-impersonations-within-cap health probe.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.role_delegations.stuck_pending
metrics.description: Count of pending delegations past their starts_at by > 1h. Should be 0.

metrics.name: academorix.delegation.impersonation.stuck_active
metrics.description: Count of active impersonation sessions past their ends_at by > 15 minutes. Should be 0. Any non-zero value is CRITICAL.
